title: Session Events, Atomic Checkpoints, Idempotent Resume, Fork, and Replay · Guided Program Studio
summary: A public-interest product team incrementally builds append-only replayable agent session from original fixed provider, interaction, tool, approval, evaluation, and failure fixtures while retaining prior Python, HTTP, prompt, loop, security, accessibility, testing, and recovery requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of append-only replayable agent session while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case pra…
objectives: Define tenant, user, session, invocation, interaction, turn, attempt, call, effect, checkpoint, and parent identities and their lifetimes.
Record typed immutable state transitions with sequence, schema, causation, correlation, redaction, and integrity evidence.
Commit state, pending calls, completed effects, budgets, approvals, and provider references atomically with version checks.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Commit to the mission model · Workshop Session Identity
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop agent engineering team handles case 4690 during an accessible public-service intake assistant. Build deterministic Python evidence to persist append-only session events and atomic checkpoints that support idempotent resume, fork, replay, and effect reconciliation; sensitive actions require a trustworthy user approval bound to exact arguments; then introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates.

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Workshop Fork Replay Simulation
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-fork-replay-simulation-sq8kno" that uses case 9151 to persist append-only session events and atomic checkpoints that support idempotent resume, fork, replay, and effect reconciliation. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Workshop Fork Replay Simulation.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Fork Replay Simulation into observable performance evidence. For Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Workshop Fork Replay Simulation, keep Fork Replay Simulation connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-fork-replay-simulation-sq8kno
# Competency: agentpy-fork-replay-simulation.
# Case 9151: a multilingual case-routing evaluation.
# Operating constraint: telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def evidence_agentpy_fork_replay_simulation_sq8kno(events: int = 36, persisted_events: int = 36, checkpoints: int = 6, replayed_checkpoints: int = 6, duplicate_effects: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_sq8kno = "sq8kno-onk8qs-9151"
    assert evidence_variant_sq8kno
    evidence_axes_sq8kno = (
        "authoritysq8kno",
        "interaction9151",
        "toolonk8qs",
        "statesq8kno9151",
        "evaluation9151sq8kno",
        "recoveryonk8qs9151",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_sq8kno)) == 6
    if events < 1 or persisted_events < 0:
        return False, persisted_events, "session-event-count"
    if persisted_events != events:
        return False, persisted_events, "event-loss"
    if checkpoints < 2 or replayed_checkpoints != checkpoints:
        return False, replayed_checkpoints, "checkpoint-replay"
    if duplicate_effects > 0:
        return False, duplicate_effects, "replay-effect-duplication"
    assert persisted_events == events and replayed_checkpoints == checkpoints and duplicate_effects == 0
    return True, replayed_checkpoints, "replayable-agent-session"

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Fork Replay Simulation structural check is only one gate. append-only replayable agent session must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.
